title: halimium lasianthum var. alyssoides
intro: Halimium lasianthum var. alyssoides, also known as the White Rock Rose, is a plant species in the family Cistaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Halimium lasianthum var. alyssoides include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
